nasb.text: Better is a poor man who walks in his integrity Than he who is perverse in speech and is a fool.

esv.text: Better is a poor person who walks in his integrity than one who is crooked in speech and is a fool.

cnv.text: 行為完全的窮人， 勝過說話欺詐的愚昧人。

ccb.text: 行为正直的穷人， 胜过诡诈的愚人。

csbs.text: 行事纯全的贫穷人， 好过言语悖谬的愚昧人。
